writing.title: Writing Task 2: Experience and detail
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) first mentioning an experience with Present Perfect, then giving a specific detail with Past Simple.
writing.sampleAnswer: I have visited Hue before. I visited it last summer, with my family. I have also tried Hue cuisine. I tried it three years ago.
checklist: Câu đầu dùng Present Perfect (không có thời điểm)
Câu sau dùng Past Simple (có thời điểm cụ thể)
Không trộn lẫn hai thì sai cách dùng

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a process
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a production process, using Passive Voice (Present Simple).
writing.sampleAnswer: Coffee is grown in the highlands. It is then processed in factories and packaged. After that, it is delivered to shops and distributed to many countries.
checklist: Mô tả các bước theo đúng thứ tự
Có dùng từ nối (then, after that)
